message:
feat(mission): anti-thrash governor with cooldown, starvation boost, and oscillation detection (ft-1i2ge.2.7)

Add ThrashGovernor with GovernorConfig, BeadGovernorState, and GovernorAction.
Three mechanisms: reassignment cooldown (blocks rapid re-assignment),
starvation-prevention (additive score boost for long-skipped beads),
and thrash detection (multiplicative penalty for oscillating beads).
Bounded history window. 25 new tests (121 total in planner_features).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
